programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team kicks things off with Bonnie Lucas of Law Enforcement Specialists, who’s on a mission to scale her police coordination service nationwide—with a game-changing app in the works. Then it’s all about beauty and impact as gallery owner David Beavis shares how his immersive landscape photography is inspiring audiences and fueling plans for expansion. Next, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage breaks down how his firm is helping Americans retire with confidence—no market risk, just guaranteed income for life. Finally, John Feldman introduces Connected & Protected, a tech-forward company keeping seniors and first responders safe across the country.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail circle back with the A-Team to map out growth strategies for Law Enforcement Specialists, whose new app has the potential to scale nationwide through smart media outreach. Kyle Reyes takes a personal interest in guiding the process, while the team also welcomes powerhouse attorney Stephen Geday, bringing sharp legal expertise to the roster. David Beavis Photography explores fresh marketing moves and B2B opportunities with designers, laying the groundwork for a gallery launch in Naples, Florida. Provision Brokerage looks to streamline its legacy with a clear plan forward, while new A-Team member Riggs Eckelberry—pioneering disruptor in the water industry—joins the mission. Finally, the team evaluates how Connected & Protected can expand their safety tech beyond seniors and first responders, reaching hospitals and even children.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competition reaches its ultimate test as the Face-Off enters Phase Two. Contestants are pushed to their breaking points with a brutal mix of tactical and physical challenges—running and gunning through the forest, navigating five tactical evolutions, and grinding through five grueling physical trials, capped by a punishing two-mile run over unforgiving terrain. Along the way, Don reveals the origins of his legendary SEAL Adventure Challenge, the inspiration behind this ultimate proving ground. When one contestant’s body shuts down in shock, the resilience of the warrior mindset is put on full display in a dramatic fight to recover and press on. In this season finale, only the strongest will endure, but every competitor leaves forged by fire.

programme.title: S3E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.
